name: Database Session Provider
description: Provides asynchronous database session management using SQLAlchemy async engine. Configures a global async engine and sessionmaker, and exposes an async generator function for dependency injection of database sessions.

types.name: AsyncSession
types.description: SQLAlchemy AsyncSession type for async database operations

functions.name: get_db
functions.description: Async generator that yields a SQLAlchemy AsyncSession for database operations. Intended for use as a FastAPI dependency. The session is automatically closed when the context exits.

error_cases.name: DatabaseConnectionError
error_cases.condition: If database_url is invalid or database is unreachable

error_cases.name: SessionCreationError
error_cases.condition: If async_session() fails to create a session

preconditions: settings.database_url must be configured and valid
postconditions: Session is automatically closed after yield completes
Session does not expire objects on commit (expire_on_commit=False)
side_effects: Closes database connection on context exit

structured_side_effects.description: Acquires and releases connection from pool

invariants: engine is created once at module load with echo=False
All sessions share the same engine instance

data_access.rationale: Provides session factory for all database read/write operations. Acts as the primary database access layer for the application.

side_effects.rationale: Manages connection pool lifecycle through SQLAlchemy async engine

authority.rationale: Owns the configuration and lifecycle of database sessions for the entire backend.api layer
